mapper.sql: select id, bill_no, status, purchasing_type, supplier_id, amount_untaxed, amount_taxed, invoice_pattern_id, pay_pattern_id, currency_id, shipment_type_id, exchange_rate, order_day, contact_id, buyer_id, buyer_dept_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sup_po
mapper.insert:
insert into sup_po
bill_no, status, purchasing_type, supplier_id, amount_untaxed, amount_taxed, invoice_pattern_id, pay_pattern_id, currency_id, shipment_type_id, exchange_rate, order_day, contact_id, buyer_id, buyer_dept_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{billNo}, #{status}, #{purchasingType}, #{supplierId}, #{amountUntaxed}, #{amountTaxed}, #{invoicePatternId}, #{payPatternId}, #{currencyId}, #{shipmentTypeId}, #{exchangeRate}, #{orderDay}, #{contactId}, #{buyerId}, #{buyerDeptId}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from sup_po where id in
#{id}
